race.name: Vasaloppet China
race.tagline: The Swedish classic goes east — fifty kilometers through Changchun's frozen forest park where China's growing Nordic ski scene takes shape.

climate.description: Changchun's extreme continental climate delivers some of the coldest conditions in the Worldloppet circuit. January temperatures range from -25°C to -10°C. Siberian air masses dominate, producing dry, cold snow. Wind chill can be severe across open sections of the forest park.
challenges: Extreme cold — among the coldest Worldloppet venues
Frostbite risk on exposed skin at -25°C and below
Dry cold affects breathing and hydration
Limited course familiarity for most international visitors

course.primary: Loop course through Jingyuetan National Forest Park on the outskirts of Changchun. The park's frozen lake and dense pine forest create a scenic setting on gently undulating terrain.
course.surface: Machine-groomed classic tracks through national forest park
course.grooming: Groomed to Worldloppet standard within the forest park
features: Set in Jingyuetan National Forest Park — one of Asia's largest urban forest parks
Licensed by the Swedish Vasaloppet organization
Frozen Jingyuetan (Clear Moon Lake) as course centerpiece

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: A young event building momentum in China's developing ski market. The Vasaloppet brand license and Worldloppet membership give it credibility. Extreme cold is both a challenge and a draw. Small field and limited competitive depth keep the score modest.

history.summary: Founded in 2003 as a collaboration between the Swedish Vasaloppet organization and Chinese skiing authorities, Vasaloppet China was created to promote cross-country skiing in Northeast China. Set in Changchun's Jingyuetan National Forest Park, the event became a Worldloppet member in 2014. It represents China's ambitions in Nordic skiing, boosted by the country's 2022 Winter Olympics hosting and government push to engage 300 million people in winter sports.
notable_facts: Licensed directly by the Swedish Vasaloppet organization
Set in Jingyuetan National Forest Park — 96 square kilometers of protected forest
Benefited from China's push to engage 300 million people in winter sports
One of the coldest venues on the Worldloppet circuit

videos.title: 2026 Vasaloppet China
videos.description:
On January 4, 2026, Vasaloppet China 2026 officially kicked off in the Jingyuetan National Scenic Area, Changchun City, Jilin Province.
As the global opening event of the Worldloppet International Ski Federation for the 2025-2026 new snow season, this year's Vasaloppet China brings together over 2,227 professional athletes and general skiers from 33 countries and regions, including 306 foreign skiers, to jointly launch an international event that combines passionate competition and dreamy ice and snow.

videos.title: Vasaloppet China – Ski the Legend in the East
videos.description:
Experience the spirit of the world’s most famous cross-country ski race, now in China.
Vasaloppet China brings the legendary Swedish tradition to the snowy landscapes of Changchun’s Jingyuetan Park, offering a unique fusion of Nordic heritage and Chinese winter wonderland.
🏔️ What to Expect
Iconic cross-country ski challenge on pristine trails
International atmosphere with skiers from around the globe
Celebration of culture, endurance, and winter sports
Whether you are a seasoned skier or a passionate sports fan, Vasaloppet China is where East meets West in a festival of snow and endurance.
👉 Subscribe to our channel for more highlights, athlete stories, and behind-the-scenes from the race.

#VasaloppetChina #CrossCountrySkiing #WinterSports #Changchun #SkiTheLegend

videos.title: 2024 Vasaloppet China-12.1-warm-up
videos.description:
★Vasaloppet Sweden: the biggest single sport event in the world with almost 50.000 participants
★Vasaloppet China: the biggest ski event in China and a new tradition born
★Vasaloppet China has FIS status and is the classic stage of Tour de Ski China 
★Seeding race status to Vasaloppet Sweden
★Vasaloppet 50km -- Classic distance in beautiful Jingyuetan Park
★Vasaloppet 25km -- Classic distance in beautiful Jingyuetan Park
★Students Vasa -- Sports Education Project further promoting skiing on grassroots level in China
★Unique marketing platform: branding, government and customer relations hand in hand

videos.title: Vasaloppet China 2019 THE RACE
videos.description: The Worldloppet race of China is the small brother of the legendary Vasaloppet! Vasaloppet China is the best cross-country skiing race in China and welcomes thousands of skiers from all around the world!
videos.curation_reason: Race coverage showing the international field and race atmosphere at this Worldloppet event.

videos.transcript:
[Music]
Basalapit China has become the only
Chinese member of the world lapit. After
23 years growth, it has now developed
into an international event integrating
cross-country ski competitions, winter
sports, cultural exchanges, and economic
and trade cooperation.
Changun is located in the middle of the
northeast plane of China and is the
capital of Jilin province.
Changun is rich in culture and tourism
resources. The green mountains and clear
waters and the ice and snow coexist and
thrive. It is located in the world's
golden latitude zone for ice and snow.
As the platinum card of Changun's ice
and snow, Basilapa, China will offer
participants a rich and diverse
experience of ice and snow culture. In
addition to fully participating in the
exciting race, participants can also
visit Ginuetin snow sculpture world and
icelight show at the new world of ice
and snow. Go to the northeast tiger park
to see pandas and visit the former royal
temple, Wanu Temple. The famous
landmarks in Chongqun cultural square
and geological palace museum will also
become important places for you to
explore the unique charm of this city.
To enrich the trip of foreign
participants to China, the organizer
will provide economical and convenient
travel packages. After finishing all the
journey in Changun, the next stop is
Beijing.
Beijing is the capital of China. As the
capital of six ancient Chinese
dynasties, it has preserved the pinnacle
of ancient Chinese architecture. Here
you can visit the imperial palaces of
the Ming and Adenzai dynasties, the
forbidden city, Tion Anman Square. On
the 1st of October 1949, the People's
Republic of China was officially founded
here. Temple of heaven is the largest
existing ancient imperial sacrificial
complex in China and Zenyang Gate is the
national gate of ancient China. Just
north of the city lies the Great Wall, a
marvel of ancient engineering winding
across rugged mountains. The city is
also famous for its delicious cuisine,
including peing duck, dumplings, and
jing.
After finishing the trip to Beijing, the
next stop is CN.
Can is one of China's four most famous
ancient capitals. Here stands a very
magnificent ancient city wall which was
built in the Ming dynasty and is well
preserved. The most famous site is
Emperor Dean Xi Kuang's tomb. There is
the astonishing terracotta warriors
which is hailed as the eighth wonder of
the world and one of the top 10 ancient
tombs of the world. You can go to Yong
Kaing Fong and try local snacks. And you
can also visit Tangi Palace to enjoy a
royal feast while watching historical
reenactments.
With these elaborately designed travel
packages, you can not only experience
worldclass skiing event, but also gain a
deep understanding of China's rich
history and culture, hoping to bring you
a unique experience.
videos.curation_reason: Official Worldloppet content providing race context and venue details at Changchun.

quotes.text: Changchun is located in the world's golden latitude zone for ice and snow. As the platinum card of Changchun's ice and snow, Vasaloppet China will offer participants a rich and diverse experience of ice and snow culture.
